results.title: Meet the Biggest Threat to Nvidia in AI Chips. It's Not AMD, Intel, or Broadcom. | The Motley Fool
Nvidia Stock Slaughters Rivals AMD & Intel as Blackwell Ultra Racks 'Lead the Market by Two Generations'
Bank of America resets Nvidia stock forecast - TheStreet
NVIDIA Stock Is Approaching An All Time High And Here Is What Finally Pushed It There - ARTVOICE
Nvidia replaced Intel in the Dow - today, Intel earnings are lifting NVDA
Which CPU Company Has Dominated 2026: Intel, AMD, or ARM Holdings? - 24/7 Wall St.
AI chipmakers that could steal some of Nvidia's spotlight in 2026

summary: NVDA controls ~81% of AI chip market per IDC. Intel Q1 2026 earnings blowout (+24.89% gap up) confirmed accelerating AI data center demand and lifted the entire semiconductor sector including NVDA. AMD growth in AI/server raises some market share questions. True competitive threat flagged as custom silicon (hyperscaler TPUs, ASICs) not AMD/Intel. Anthropic committed to 1M Google TPUs. Nvidia's Rubin architecture targeted late 2026, maintaining yearly cadence that rivals cannot match. NVDA self-estimates $1T in Blackwell+Rubin chip sales for 2026-2027.
